use_cases: Portfolio project showcase with interactive 3D folder opening animation
Creative agency project gallery with card carousel effect
Product demo landing page featuring work samples
Developer portfolio with animated project cards
SaaS landing page showcasing featured projects
ai_summary: An interactive 3D folder component that displays project cards in a carousel-style layout with smooth opening animations, rotation effects, and click-to-reveal interactions. Features cubic-bezier transitions with transform-based 3D positioning for a dimensional presentation. Perfect for portfolios, project showcases, and creative landing pages requiring an engaging, animated display of work samples.
